title: ONYX Lightsabers
description: Changes The Vanilla Sword Textures To Lightsabers
body:
Changes The Vanilla Sword Textures To Lightsabers!

Most Sword Textures Are Standard Lightsabers
but...
**Netherite Sword Is The Darksaber**

Better With [ONYX PVP Essentials 1.2.1+](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/onyx-pvp)!

YT - https://www.youtube.com/@ascent_mc
TikTok - https://www.tiktok.com/@ascent.mc
